Off Calendar Mar-27-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Court Call Appearance; Rory Clark, Esq., 818-707-2733 for plaintiff and opposing party Capital One Bank

RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS --
DEFENDANT JAMES MURRAY'S Amended Motion To Set Aside Default Judgment IS DENIED FOR FAILURE TO FILE BY MARCH 10, 2006 PER COURT'S ORDER OF FEBRUARY 27, 2006. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton, CSR #1558.(301/JLW/DM)
